operations.old_ex: She felt a sudden surge of anger.
operations.new_ex: She felt a sudden surge (rush) of anger.

operations.old_ex: A disastrous business venture lost him thousands of dollars.
operations.new_ex: A disastrous business venture (undertaking) lost him thousands of dollars.

operations.old_ex: Not speaking the language proved to be a bigger handicap than I'd imagined.
operations.new_ex: Not speaking the language proved to be a bigger handicap (obstacle) than I'd imagined.

operations.old_ex: Even when he became a star he didn’t have any airs and graces.
operations.new_ex: Even when he became a star he didn’t have any airs and graces. (airs)

operations.old_ex: When the reservoir becomes blocked, the only remedy lies in cleaning the entire system.
operations.new_ex: When the reservoir becomes blocked, the only remedy (solution) lies in cleaning the entire system.

operations.old_ex: Holding copyright provides the only legal remedy against unauthorized copying.
operations.new_ex: Holding copyright provides the only legal remedy (redress) against unauthorized copying.

operations.old_ex: I don't know how you have the nerve to show your face after what you said!
operations.new_ex: I don't know how you have the nerve (cheek) to show your face after what you said!

operations.old_ex: It took a lot of nerve to take the company to court.
operations.new_ex: It took a lot of nerve (guts) to take the company to court.

operations.old_ex: The house was reduced to a pile of rubble.
operations.new_ex: The house was reduced to a pile (heap) of rubble.

operations.old_ex: people living on the margins of society
operations.new_ex: people living on the margins of society (fringe)

operations.old_ex: There has been a head-on clash between the two candidates over education policy.
operations.new_ex: There has been a head-on clash (conflict) between the two candidates over education policy.

operations.old_ex: a personality clash with the boss
operations.new_ex: a personality clash (conflict) with the boss

operations.old_ex: She showed her pedigree on her face and in her carriage.
operations.new_ex: She showed her pedigree on her face and in her carriage (bearing).

operations.old_ex: Dried fruits are especially high in fibre.
operations.new_ex: Dried fruits are especially high in fibre (roughage).

operations.old_ex: I couldn't get a grip on what was going on.
operations.new_ex: I couldn't get a grip (grasp) on what was going on.

operations.old_ex: He had a bit of a gut on him, but otherwise he was quite skinny.
operations.new_ex: He had a bit of a gut (belly) on him, but otherwise he was quite skinny.

operations.old_ex: At the first hint of trouble, they left.
operations.new_ex: At the first hint (sign) of trouble, they left.

operations.old_ex: There was more than a hint of sadness in his voice.
operations.new_ex: There was more than a hint (suggestion) of sadness in his voice.

operations.old_ex: The teacher’s book gives useful hints on how to develop reading skills.
operations.new_ex: The teacher’s book gives useful hints on how to develop reading skills. (tip)

operations.old_ex: Well, at least you weren't hurt.
operations.new_ex: Well, at least you weren't hurt. (humanity)

operations.old_ex: The outlook for jobs is bleak.
operations.new_ex: The outlook (prospect) for jobs is bleak.

operations.old_ex: No one has yet claimed responsibility for this latest terrorist outrage.
operations.new_ex: No one has yet claimed responsibility for this latest terrorist outrage (atrocity).

operations.old_ex: Will the government honour its election pledge not to raise taxes?
operations.new_ex: Will the government honour its election pledge (commitment) not to raise taxes?

operations.old_ex: I hope to have the privilege of working with them again.
operations.new_ex: I hope to have the privilege (honour) of working with them again.

operations.old_ex: She chopped the vegetables quickly using a food processor.
operations.new_ex: She chopped the vegetables quickly using a food processor (central processing unit).

operations.old_ex: Getting a work permit in the UK is not always a simple proposition.
operations.new_ex: Getting a work permit in the UK is not always a simple proposition (matter).

operations.old_ex: After a furious late rally, they finally scored.
operations.new_ex: After a furious late rally (recovery), they finally scored.

operations.old_ex: It was the realization of his greatest ambition.
operations.new_ex: It was the realization (achievement) of his greatest ambition.

operations.old_ex: The police appealed to the crowd for restraint.
operations.new_ex: The police appealed to the crowd for restraint (self-control).

operations.old_ex: The ultimate sanction will be the closure of the restaurant.
operations.new_ex: The ultimate sanction (penalty) will be the closure of the restaurant.

operations.old_ex: These changes will require the sanction of the court.
operations.new_ex: These changes will require the sanction (authorization) of the court.

operations.old_ex: She seemed to have lost all sensation in her arms.
operations.new_ex: She seemed to have lost all sensation (feeling) in her arms.

operations.old_ex: Astronauts have brought back specimens of rock from the moon.
operations.new_ex: Astronauts have brought back specimens of rock from the moon. (sample)

operations.old_ex: The wizard recited a spell.
operations.new_ex: The wizard recited a spell (enchantment).

operations.old_ex: I completely fell under her spell.
operations.new_ex: I completely fell under her spell (charm).

operations.old_ex: This information is of the highest utility to a historian.
operations.new_ex: This information is of the highest utility (usefulness) to a historian.

operations.old_ex: a vein of gold
operations.new_ex: a vein (seam) of gold

operations.old_ex: The plan has the virtue of simplicity.
operations.new_ex: The plan has the virtue (advantage) of simplicity.

operations.old_ex: The newspaper published a withdrawal the next day.
operations.new_ex: The newspaper published a withdrawal (retraction) the next day.

operations.old_ex: How do you express 25% as a fraction?
operations.new_ex: How do you express 25% as a fraction (rational number)?

operations.old_ex: His work simply isn't up to scratch.
operations.new_ex: His work simply isn't up to scratch (satisfactory).
